title: Martin Marietta (MLM) to Divest South Texas Business for $2.1B
text: Martin Marietta (MLM) to sell its South Texas cement business and some of its related concrete operations to CRH Americas Materials, Inc. for $2.1 billion.

title: CRH to buy $2.1 billion for South Texas cement operations of Martin Marietta Materials
text: CRH CRH said it's paying $2.1 billion for South Texas cement operations from Martin Marietta Materials MLM. CRH, which separately reported earnings, said the combined portfolio of assets is expected to generate pro-forma 2023 EBITDA of approximately $170 million.

title: Martin Marietta to Divest South Texas Cement and Related Concrete Operations to CRH plc
text: RALEIGH, N.C., Nov. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its South Texas cement business and certain of its related concrete operations to CRH Americas Materials, Inc., a subsidiary of CRH plc, for $2.1 billion in cash. More specifically, the facilities to be divested include the Hunter cement plant in New Braunfels, related cement distribution terminals and 20 concrete plants serving the Austin and San Antonio region.

title: Martin Marietta Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: RALEIGH, N.C. , Nov. 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.74 per share on the Company's outstanding common stock. This dividend, which represents a cash dividend of $2.96 per share on an annualized basis, is payable December 29, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on December 1, 2023.

title: Martin Marietta's (MLM) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Lag, View Up

title: Martin Marietta Reports Third-Quarter 2023 Results
text: Achieved Record Quarterly Consolidated Revenues, Profitability and Margins Aggregates Gross Profit Per Ton Increased 42.4 Percent to $7.89 Robust Earnings Growth Reinforces Benefits of Value-Over-Volume Strategy Raised Adjusted EBITDA Guidance RALEIGH, N.C., Nov. 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”), a leading national supplier of aggregates and heavy building materials, today reported results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2023.
